name: Cape Coral 2pk Aluminum Modern Dining Chairs - Silver - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Slat Design, for Patio & Outdoor
description: Give your outdoor dining set a set of dining chairs that brings both chic style and simple comfort to your space. These Christopher Knight Home Cape Coral 2PK Aluminum Modern Dining Chairs offer a smooth aluminum frame to create a sleek and comfortable space for your backyard or patio. This chair set provides a breezy comfort that offers effortless relaxation while you enjoy an outdoor meal or just unwind during the summer season. Showcasing a classic open slat design and edgy modern frame, these Christopher Knight Home Cape Coral 2PK Aluminum Modern Dining Chairs are the perfect addition to any sophisticated outdoor decor.
